creator: zackdannar@yahoo.com
text:
I received the patch from yongari.  I also had to have the pcivar.h file due to a struct member missing(ht_slave).  I have applied the patch to an 8.2 build and everything appears to be working correctly.  

I will check the link that you provided against my 8.1 host and verify.  The steps used to verify the 8.2 host were:

Process:

- Kernel built

- I installed it.

- Rebooted

- ran dhclient bge0 and pulled an address.  

- Performed a short confirmation via SSH to another host.  All appears 
to be well.


As I had asked yongari, when will I be able to pull a fresh copy of 8.2 and verify that patches from a clean install?

Thanks for all of your help.
